comment: Mean Green Lawn and Landscape did a fantastic job solving a drainage issue at my home.  They were able to complete the work in a single day and left my property in great shape. I would highly recommend working with Evelin, Denisse and their team if you have lawn, landscape or drainage needs.
draft_response: We appreciate you taking the time, Craig. Your feedback on the lawn care service is exactly the kind of detail that helps us maintain the Black Hill Standard across every property. Thank you for choosing Black Hill Landscaping.
